are neutral in relationship. Should they be naturally neutral and temporarily inimical, they are

32-33. Planetary Aspects. Planets lend ? aspect on the 3rd and 10th, half aspect on the 4th and 8th,
? aspect on 5th and 9th and full aspect on the 7th from their positions. Saturn has special full
aspect on the 3rd and 10th, Jupiter on the 5th and the 9th and Mars on the 4th and 8th. All
planets aspect the 7th fully.
34. Planetary Strengths. To assess the auspicious and inauspicious effects of a planet, its
directional, positional, temporal and motional strengths are important, for without these it is
considered to be weak.
35. Directional and Positional Strengths.
